title: JavaScript
subTitle: Core language for dynamic web applications
overviewContent: I work fluently in core JavaScript, applying in-depth knowledge of ES5 and ES6+ features to build efficient, maintainable, and scalable web applications. This solid foundation in vanilla JavaScript lets me integrate seamlessly with libraries and frameworks such as React, Next.js, and jQuery, and create complex, interactive user interfaces. I consistently optimise my JavaScript to keep performance smooth across desktop, tablet, and mobile platforms, delivering high-quality, professional web experiences.
